title: A Beautiful Vietnam Experience
travelStyle: Nature & Adventure,  +2 moreCulinary Tours, Culture & History

itinerary.title: Hanoi arrival – airport transfer
itinerary.description: As you step off your plane at Noi Bai International Airport, our friendly guide will be waiting for you at the baggage claim area. Look for the sign adorned with our distinctive Asia Tour Advisor logo and your name. Your comfort and ease are our top priorities. Once you're ready, we'll escort you to your hotel, providing a brief introduction to the city along the way. The remainder of the day is yours to settle in, unwind, and begin exploring Hanoi.
activities: Hanoi, with its seven million inhabitants, serves as the capital of Vietnam. This city gracefully combines tradition and refinement, boasting French colonial architecture, tree-lined boulevards, seren

itinerary.title: Hanoi City Tour
itinerary.description: Hanoi is an irresistible destination for its picturesque pagodas, ancient temples, enchanting French colonial quarter, and cultural institutions. Just as fun, however, is darting down its winding lanes and discovering your own favorite hidden corners. Hanoi’s winding streets are full of surprises from quiet cafés to vibrant local markets filled with more fresh fruit than one could imagine. Exploring these hidden gems provides visitors with a deeper and more meaningful connection to the city of Hanoi and offers a memorable visit to all.
activities: After a satisfying breakfast at your hotel, our local tour guide will pick you up to embark on an exploration of Vietnam's capital city, Hanoi. With over a thousand years of history, this city is rich

In addition to these historically rich sites like Chi Minh Mausoleum, your tour guide will take you to the delicate beauty of the One Pillar Pagoda and the Tran Quoc Temple. These places of worship ar
After lunch, continue your journey with a visit to the millennia-old Temple of Literature. This ancient Confucius temple once served as the country's first university and played an incredibly crucial

Next on the itinerary for the day is a visit to Hoa Lo. This somber historical site once acted as a prison used by the French colonists in Vietnam for political prisoners. Later it was used by North V

To cap off your day you will have the opportunity to enjoy a one-hour cycle tour through the bustling and lively Old Quarter, immersing yourself in the vibrant marketplace atmosphere.  Sample deliciou

itinerary.title: Hanoi – Halong bay cruise
itinerary.description: Our journey embarks from Hanoi where we'll pick you up for a scenic drive through the verdant landscapes of the Red River Delta. Our destination: the world-famous UNESCO World Heritage site, Halong Bay, Lan Ha Bay. Here, you'll embark on a luxurious cruise for an enchanting overnight cruise.
activities: As you relax on board, you'll be captivated by the breathtaking limestone karsts that majestically emerge from the azure waters, surrounded by thousands of jungle-clad islands seemingly suspended on t

Enjoy a delicious seafood lunch with breathtaking views and a refreshing drink. Our next destination is a charming fishing village, where locals have ingeniously turned their boats into a floating com

itinerary.title: Halong – airport – Fly to Danang – Hoi An
itinerary.description: Kickstart your day with Tai Chi on the top deck or savor the sunrise over the bay. Sip on morning coffee or tea before setting out to explore nearby islands via rowboat.
activities: Upon returning to the junk, witness a fruit carving demonstration and participate in a cooking class, learning to create traditional Vietnamese cuisine from scratch. Enjoy a Vietnamese lunch on board
Upon arrival in Danang airport, your tour guide and driver will transfer you to your hotel in Hoi An—a destination that seamlessly blends old-world charm with pristine beaches and luxurious resorts.

itinerary.title: Hoi An exploring
itinerary.description: Begin your day with a morning market tour, sourcing a variety of fresh ingredients for your upcoming cooking class later in the afternoon. Accompanied by your guide and driver, you'll embark on a journey to the bustling Hoi An local market, where a myriad of sights, sounds, and aromas await. Take a leisurely stroll through the market's vibrant aisles, engaging with local vendors and selecting the finest produce for your culinary adventure that awaits. Though some may find the markets overwhelming, when looking for fresh food for a good price the market is my favorite place to visit. The immense amount of variety offered ensures that I can find everything that I need.
activities: Following your market escapade, head to Cam Thanh village, making a pit stop at the enchanting Bay Mau Water Palm Forest. Enjoy a brief riverside walk in this quaint fishing hamlet before hopping onto

Next, continue to Tra Que herbs and vegetables village, where a farmer's family awaits to greet you. Don traditional farmer attire and explore the nearby farming land with authentic tools. Engage in a
Cap off the day with an afternoon exploration of Hoi An's UNESCO-recognized ancient town. Visit iconic landmarks such as the Japanese Bridge, a Sino-Vietnamese merchant house, a Chinese Temple, Hoian

itinerary.title: Free time – Fly to Buon Me Thuot (Tue, Thu, Sat only)
itinerary.description: You'll have the morning for a leisure breakfast before we come to collect you and take you to Danang to catch a flight to Buon Me Thuot. When you arrive at the airport, you will be met and transferred directly to your hotel. Enjoy the balance of the day at leisure.

itinerary.title: Buon Me Thuot – Elephant ride – Lak Lake – Buon Me Thuot
itinerary.description: After breakfast, visit Lak Lake, have an ride elephant to cross Lak Lake (1 hour), do dug-out canoe on Lak Lake (30’) + sight seeings. Have lunch at a local restaurant.
activities: In the afternoon, visit villages of M’lieng, Le and Jun. Discover the culture of the M’nong R’lam. Enjoy Gongs Show or go fishing with local people by dug-out canoe (optional). Visit plantations of pe

itinerary.title: Waterfall – flying to Saigon
itinerary.description: Today, start to visit D’ray Nur Fall (chance of swimming in good season), Ako D’hong Village (Ede people), Trung Nguyen Coffee Village. Have lunch at a local restaurant.
activities: If time permits, enjoy a local coffee & ready for the flight to Saigon.When you arrive at the airport, you will be met and transferred directly to your hotel. Enjoy the balance of the day at leisure.

itinerary.title: Cu Chi tunnels – city visit
itinerary.description: After enjoying your breakfast, your private guide will meet accompany you on a drive to Cu Chi, a quaint community located 60km northwest of Ho Chi Minh City. Cu Chi is renowned for its extensive network of tunnels, which served as a strategic hideout and infiltration route for the Viet Cong during the latter stages of the Vietnam War.
activities: Upon arrival, you'll have the opportunity to watch a brief introductory video from the era before delving into the tunnels themselves, widely recognized as one of the world's most significant battlegr
After exploring the Tunnels, you'll return to the city, where you'll enjoy a delicious lunch at a local restaurant.

In the afternoon you will embark on a journey to discover some of Ho Chi Minh City's most iconic landmarks. You will begin with the Reunification Palace, a monumental witness to the culmination of the

Next, visit the Notre Dame Cathedral and the colonial-styled Central Post Office.  The War Remnants Museum offers fascinating insights into the Vietnamese struggle for independence, freedom, and peace

Conclude your day with a visit to Ben Thanh Market, an iconic symbol of the city. Pulsating with the energy of commerce and cultural vibrancy, where the rhythmic bargaining and the aromas of street fo

itinerary.title: Saigon – Mekong Delta
itinerary.description: After breakfast, your private guide and driver will escort you out of Ho Chi Minh City and onto beautiful country roads to Ben Tre Town in the Mekong Delta. This region of the Mekong Delta is famous for its vast rice fields, numerous waterways, and stunning landscapes. Known as the ‘rice bowl’ of Vietnam, the Mekong Delta produces the majority of the country’s fruit, rice, sugar cane, and coconuts. On your journey, you will have the opportunity to take in the endless acres of green fields and the picturesque scenery.
activities: Following the two-hour drive through lush farming land, you will arrive in Ben Tre. Once you have arrived you will set out on a motorized boat trip on narrow channels winding through the coconut fores
Take a leisurely walk along the village lanes, visiting the local homes where you can try fresh fruits and taste delicious honey tea while enjoying a local Tai Tu music show. Continue your visit with

Next, you will take a small sampan through palm-fringed back canals, gliding peacefully along the hidden waterways surrounded by an immense variety of tropical plants. The quiet, rural setting is a we
Enjoy sitting in the back a Motor Cart (xe lôi) passing local hamlets, rice fields, coconut groves, and lush orchard farms while meeting with local people.
After partaking in a delicious lunch at a local restaurant you will return to Ben Tre town and continue the drive through the fields and towns of the Mekong to Can Tho city.

Spend the evening at your leisure. We suggest exploring Can Tho night market by yourself and trying some local food. The market streets come alive with dozens of bustling food stalls selling grilled m

itinerary.title: Floating market – Saigon
itinerary.description: Rise early the next morning for a boat trip to Cai Rang market, the biggest floating wholesale market of the Mekong region. The market comes alive with hundreds of small boats darting through the water as vendors sell their goods. Glide through the matrix of boats to see how the locals trade fruits, vegetables other products and learn more about the floating marketing culture and the daily life of those who call the boats home. After immersing yourself in the lively atmosphere, enjoy a delicious local breakfast of rice noodle soup on the boat just like the way the local people do. You will also have an opportunity to stop at a local boat to enjoy some of the succulent seasonal fruit.
activities: Once you have finished exploring the market, continue your boat ride along narrow canals to visit a traditional homemade rice noodle factory. Here you can observe how the locals make rice noodles and

You will return to the City to visit Binh Thuy Old House, a beautiful historic home, where you will meet the present owner of the home and its furnishings. This stop provides the opportunity to connec

itinerary.title: Saigon – Departure
itinerary.description: Your last day in Vietnam grants you free time in the morning, allowing you to savor the city's atmosphere until your private car arrives to transfer you to the airport for your onward journey.
activities: This marks the end of your Flavor of Vietnam adventure with Asia Tour Advisor. We extend our heartfelt thanks for joining us on this incredible journey to explore the wonders of Vietnam. Farewell, and
